name: scrooge-mcrouter
description: Scrooge McRouter dispatches Launchpad to scout your workspace and packages a Treasure Map for a heavier model on the web.

chatParticipants.name: scrooge
chatParticipants.description: Dispatches Launchpad to scout your codebase and packages a Treasure Map for the boss.

commands.name: dispatch
commands.description: Force a scouting run and a Treasure Map (skip routing).

commands.name: implement
commands.description: Force Launchpad to implement directly (skip routing).

commands.name: penny
commands.description: Force a direct text answer — penny's worth of work (skip routing).

commands.name: deposit
commands.description: Pure-local apply: parse pasted SEARCH/REPLACE text into the vault (no LM call).

scroogeMcRouter.autoSaveAfterDeposit.description: After applying any deposit (manual /deposit, auto-detected paste, or model-emitted edits), save touched files to disk automatically. Disable to leave files dirty for manual review.
